description: Letter from Shelomo [...], in Damietta, to Shemuel ha-Levi, in Fustat/Cairo. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Friday, 29 Adar II 5559 AM, which is 5 April 1799 CE. Mentions other traders with the surname Burgos. Needs examination for content.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Damietta לקהיר. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
